title: rubus koehleri var. reuteri
intro: Rubus koehleri var. reuteri, also known as the Korean black raspberry, is a variety of the Rubus koehleri plant, which belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its high content of anthocyanins and ellagic acid, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus koehleri var. reuteri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against certain types of cancer. Rubus koehleri var. reuteri can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or extract, and is also used in traditional Korean medicine to support overall health and well-being.
